title: hieracium murorum subsp. chloroscyphicum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. chloroscyphicum, also known as the wall hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. chloroscyphicum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues.
